Localization.Description: Files are uploaded via the web interface

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to replace content of file {object.name} in branch "{datafield3}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} uploaded file {object.name} to branch "{datafield3}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} replaced content of file {object.name} in branch "{datafield3}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to upload file {object.name} to branch "{datafield3}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
